Question: Match the nutrient with its main function
Answer:
1) Carbohydrates - c) Provide energy
2) Proteins - a) Help in growth and repair
3) Fats - b) Provide concentrated energy and insulation
4) Vitamins - d) Protect from diseases and help body function
5) Minerals - e) Strengthen bones and teeth
6) Iron - f) Helps in formation of hemoglobin
7) Calcium - g) Builds strong bones and teeth
8) Fiber - h) Aids in digestion and prevents constipation
9) Water - i) Regulates body temperature and transports nutrients
10) Vitamin A - j) Improves vision and keeps skin healthy
11) Vitamin D - k) Helps in calcium absorption and bone health
12) Vitamin C - l) Prevents scurvy and boosts immunity
13) Iodine - m) Prevents goiter
14) Magnesium - n) Supports muscle and nerve function
15) Phosphorus - o) Strengthens bones and teeth
